function FavouritesPanel({ favs }) { const safeFavs = Array.isArray(favs) ? favs : []; const fmtMoney = (n) => typeof n === "number" ? n.toLocaleString(undefined, { maximumFractionDigits: 2 }) : "—"; const fmtPct = (n) => typeof n === "number" ? `${n.toFixed(2)}%` : "—"; if (!Array.isArray(favs)) { return (

Favourites

Click a bookmark to load your favourites.

); } return (

Favourites

{safeFavs.length === 0 ? "No favourites saved yet." : `${safeFavs.length} saved coin${safeFavs.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}`}

{safeFavs.length > 0 && (
{safeFavs.map((c) => (
{c.name}
{String(c.symbol || "").toUpperCase()}
= 0 ? "isUp" : "isDown") } title="24h change" > {fmtPct(c.price_change_percentage_24h)}
Price
£{fmtMoney(c.current_price)}
Market cap
£{fmtMoney(c.market_cap)}
Volume
£{fmtMoney(c.total_volume)}
Rank
#{c.market_cap_rank ?? "—"}
))}
)}
); } export default FavouritesPanel
